–1. A priest in the reign of Zedekiah, king of Judah
  .Sent by the king to Jeremiah with a message soliciting the prophet’ s 
intercession and prayersJer 21:1,2
  .Shows Jeremiah the false prophet’ s letterJer 29:25-29
  .Taken to Riblah and killed2Ki 25:18-21;Jer 52:24-27
–2. A Kohathite1Ch 6:36
–3. A prophet in the days of JosiahZep 1:1
–4. Father of JosiahZec 6:10,14
